TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Cicala'ay, title = Cicala'ay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cicala'ay} }

S.FORM: alang Cicala'ay ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Ikekami go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 537 buwan, 1,368 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 23% kyan ku 309 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 77% kyan ku 1,059 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 18%, Bunun 2%, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cicala'ay hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Cicala'ay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Cicala'ay hya' ga Ku'ang sang go. tay mkraya' na Cicala'ay hya' ga Hualien. tay mkyahu' na Cicala'ay hya' ga Ciataw. tay 'zil na Cicala'ay hya' ga Dihekoay. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Cicala'ay ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Cicala'ay ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Cicala'ay ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Ikekami go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 537 buwan, 1,368 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 23% kyan ku 309 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 77% kyan ku 1,059 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 18%, Bunun 2%, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cicala'ay hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Cicala'ay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Cicala'ay hya' ga Ku'ang sang go. tay mkraya' na Cicala'ay hya' ga Hualien. tay mkyahu' na Cicala'ay hya' ga Ciataw. tay 'zil na Cicala'ay hya' ga Dihekoay. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Cicala'ay ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Cicala'ay ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč ¶~ ®i ¶~ ®ala Ēaj …£a nija mki s~…ēku tajto keŇč atu ikekami …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *,*** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *,*** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, amis~…ē **%, ő≤unun *%, pajwan *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na ¶~ ®i ¶~ ®ala Ēaj ńßja Ē …£a ws~…ēiluŇč krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na ¶~ ®i ¶~ ®ala Ēaj ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkjańßu Ē na ¶~ ®i ¶~ ®ala Ēaj ńßja Ē …£a ku ĒaŇč s~…ēaŇč …£o. taj mkraja Ē na ¶~ ®i ¶~ ®ala Ēaj ńßja Ē …£a ńßualien. taj mkjańßu Ē na ¶~ ®i ¶~ ®ala Ēaj ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®iataw. taj Ēzil na ¶~ ®i ¶~ ®ala Ēaj ńßja Ē …£a *ińßekoaj. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj qalaŇč ¶~ ®i ¶~ ®ala Ēaj …£a uŇčat kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan qalaŇč ¶~ ®i ¶~ ®ala Ēaj …£a uŇčat pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
